full_text: Kuldeep Yadav to Mitchell Marsh, Caught by Axar!! Wow. Hire a Lexicographer to describe that. Third time not so lucky for Mr. Marsh. This catch reminds me of the catch taken by Adam Bacher in 1997 off Sachin Tendulkar at Newlands. The ball was going at the pace of knots. A length ball onto the pads, pulled away hard behind square. Axar was a little late on it as well but he plucked a hand out and it stuck. It was his non dominant right hand as well. India had dropped Marsh twice and it takes a stunner to get rid of him. India will look to come back into the game with this take. The catch was more special because he grabbed it off his right hand despite being a southpaw.
